name: CathayOnline, Inc.
summary: Cathayonline, Inc. operates as a fully integrated Internet company serving the global Chinese community, with a primary focus on the People's Republic of China. The company, through its subsidiary companies and exclusive partnership and joint venture arrangements with certain Chinese entities, operates as an Internet Service Provider. It provides Web based email and advanced messaging services, principally in the areas of Sichuan province, Beijing, and Guangdong. The company's Web-based email and advanced messaging services also include Fax over Internet and Voice over Internet. Cathayonline, Inc. was founded in 1995 and is based in New York, New York.
